content.title: XPAD 5.0
content.single3: Xpad 5.0: An Intelligent Hub Designed for Public Transit | Streamax
content.single8: The core engine for smart public transportation upgrades, it delivers holistic digital solutions.
content.note1: The core engine for smart public transportation upgrades, it delivers holistic digital solutions.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax Xpad 5.0, an intelligent hub designed for public transit. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1:
XPAD 5.0, a 10.1-inch Android touch screen with highly integrated design, is designed to enhance the management efficiency and operation safety for public transportation. 

It employs advanced AI technology to proactively alert drivers about the risks, helping to reduce accidents. 

Additionally, it is equipped with positioning and cellular connectivity, meets the daily needs of dispatching, scheduling and stop annoucement.

batchPhoto2.title: Android 14
10.1-inch touch screen
Built-in WIFI, cellular module
Extensive peripheral interfaces
Rich storage option
Multi-channel video recording
Quick boot-up to show the reverse video
Rich AI features
Supports driving two Passenger Information Screens
Support various mounting methods
Wide operating temperature range

content.title: P3D
content.single3: P3D: A Camera Designed for Public Transit | Streamax
content.single8: Advanced passenger counting camera incorporates object identification and OD (Origin to Destination).
content.note1: Advanced passenger counting camera incorporates object identification and OD (Origin to Destination).
content.note3: Discover the Streamax P3D, a camera designed for public transit. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1:
This APC (Automatic Passenger Counter) camera accurately counts passengers boarding and alighting, distinguishing between adults, children, and items such as wheelchairs, babystrollers, and bicycles. It automatically detects door opening and closing, saving 30% on installation and wiring time. 

The APC data is uploaded via the network to the cloud platform, which analyses and compiles passenger flow statistics, including passengers' origin and destination points.

batchPhoto2.title: AI automatic passenger counting
Identify and distinguish between adults and children
Object detection: bicycle, wheelchair, baby stroller
OD (Origin - Destination) feature: recognizing passengers' non-biological features and matching the starting and stopping points of passengers.
Automatically detects door opening and closing
Various mounting methods
Various certifications: E-mark, RoHS, CE-EMC, EN50155, REACH, ITxPT, EN45545

content.title: C46
content.single3: C46: A Camera Designed for Mining Industry | Streamax
content.single8: See the unseen in every tunnel.
content.note1: See the unseen in every tunnel.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax C46, a camera designed for Mining Industry. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: This underground mining blind-spot camera is built for medium and small vehicles such as underground trucks and LHDs. Its compact housing mounts close to the vehicle body to reduce collision damage, while 1080P wide-angle imaging and smart blacklight technology restore a clear view of the surroundings in low-speed, low-light tunnels. With built-in AI for pedestrian and vehicle detection, it turns hidden risks in underground drifts into visible, actionable alerts for operators.

batchPhoto2.title: Compact, vehicle-hugging design optimized for underground transporters and loaders, ideal where blind zones are small and space is tight
1080P wide-angle video (HFOV up to 175°) with smart blacklight full-color night vision for low-light underground environments
Built-in AI computing for blind-spot pedestrian and small-vehicle detection with active safety alerts to the driver
Automotive-grade vibration resistance, IP69K dust/water protection, and support for GPS, speed and steering signal inputs for richer event data

content.title: C29N
content.single3: C29N: A Camera Designed for Mining Industry | Streamax
content.single8: Focused driving, safer mining.
content.note1: Focused driving, safer mining.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax C29N, a camera designed for Mining industry. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: This mining-grade Driver Monitoring System (DMS) uses AI enhanced for helmets, masks,and constant movement. It delivers reliable fatigue and distraction detection even when drivers wear PPE, works fully offline with in-cab audio and seat-vibration alerts, and can integrate with wearable devices to build a more accurate picture of driver fatigue in harsh mining conditions.

batchPhoto2.title: AI vision model enhanced for helmets, masks, reflective lenses and body movement, more robust than standard DMS systems
Mining-optimized tuning for drivers wearing reflective clothing, hard hats, respirators or face shields to ensure reliable detection in real-world conditions
Extended safety through integration with wearable devices for more accurate fatigue detection, especially when sunglasses or visors block direct eye tracking
Edge AI on the vehicle so the system keeps working with no network, with strong in-cab audio and seat-vibration alerts that cut through noisy mining environments

content.content1: This open-pit mining blind-spot camera provides AI-powered detection of pedestrians and small vehicles hidden around haul trucks and auxiliary equipment. With mining-tuned algorithms, urban/mining dual modes and blacklight imaging, it delivers reliable alerts on unmarked roads, complex intersections and night shifts, helping operators avoid the accidents they can’t see coming.

batchPhoto2.title: Mining-adaptive AI tuned for unmarked roads, complex junctions and unique mining maneuvers
People and vehicle recognition for pedestrians and small vehicles such as pickups, light trucks and inspection cars in blind spots
Single hardware platform with dual operational modes: urban pedestrian warning mode and full-mine blind-spot protection mode
Blacklight technology for uncompromised vision and stable detection in low light, dust, fog and night operations

content.title: M1N 2.0
content.single3: M1N 2.0: An MDVR Designed for Trucking Industry | Streamax
content.single8: All-in-one 6-channel smart MDVR — more powerful, more flexible, and more compact.
content.note1: All-in-one 6-channel smart MDVR — more powerful, more flexible, and more compact.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax M1N2.0, an MDVR designed for Trucking Industry. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: The M1N 2.0 is a compact all-in-one in-vehicle smart MDVR built for fleets that need powerful video access, reliable storage, and onboard AI — all in one device. It supports hybrid access of up to 4 AHD channels and 2 IPC channels, enabling full 6-channel 1080P@30fps real-time recording with zero frame loss. With a high-performance processor and neural network inference engine, it runs AI algorithms such as ADAS and DMS, helping prevent accidents and ensure safer driving. With multi-system positioning (GPS / BDS / GALILEO / GLONASS) and automotive-grade sealed quick-disconnect connectors, it enables faster installation, easier maintenance, and flexible deployment across fleets.

batchPhoto2.title: Hybrid video access: supports 4 AHD + 2 IPC for full 6-channel 1080P recording
Zero frame loss with real-time 1080P@30fps full-frame encoding
Large-capacity storage with dual MicroSD (up to 2 × 1TB) and M.2 SSD (up to 2TB)
Multi-system positioning powered by GPS / BDS / GALILEO / GLONASS
Automotive-grade sealed quick-disconnect connectors for fast installation and service
High-performance processor and neural network engine supporting ADAS and DMS
Rich I/O options including RS232, RS485, and IO for wider compatibility

content.single3: C6 Lite 2.0: A Dashcam Designed for Trucking Industry | Streamax

content.note1: Entry-Level AI Dashcam: The most affordable first step into ADAS and DSC.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax C6 Lite 2.0, a dashcam designed for Trucking industry. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: The C6 Lite 2.0 is an entry-level 2-channel AI dashcam built for SMB fleets seeking a cost-effective way to adopt ADAS and DSC. With real-time detection of unsafe driving behaviors and instant in-cab alerts, it helps drivers avoid accidents and improve day-to-day driving habits. Event footage and driving data can be uploaded to the fleet platform for coaching and compliance management. In addition, live location, vehicle status data, remote intercom, and HD playback provide essential fleet visibility—without the cost or complexity of multi-channel systems. With easy OBD installation and a simple, user-friendly design, it delivers practical AI protection at outstanding value.

batchPhoto2.title: Dual ultra-wide front and cabin lenses, supporting up to 1080P HD recording
Supports 2-channel recording
Up to 2 × 1TB MicroSD storage with simultaneous main & sub-stream recording
Built-in Wi-Fi, 4G, positioning module, and 6-axis G-sensor for essential connectivity and driving event detection
AES256 encryption + TLS1.3 secure data transmission
Echo-cancellation technology keeps platform-to-cabin communication clear and echo-free

Suitable for all medium to large M2/M3/N2/N3 vehicles, the system transmits alert signals via the CAN network, providing early warning prompts for occupants and drivers.

content.title: ESS-A
content.single3: ESS-A: An Intelligent Hub Designed for OEM | Streamax
content.single8: "Distilled Intelligence, Proven Heritage": The Streamax Vision-based GSRII solution. The solid state of confidence for the road ahead.​
content.note1: "Distilled Intelligence, Proven Heritage": The Streamax Vision-based GSRII solution. The solid state of confidence for the road ahead.​
content.note3: Discover the Streamax ESS-A, an intelligent hub designed for OEM. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: The system employs AI to recognise speed limit sign information, integrating map data to provide drivers with speeding alerts for enhanced road safety. Concurrently, the main unit receives video feeds from the DDAW camera, utilising AI algorithms based on deep learning rules to assess driver fatigue levels. It categorises abnormal states according to perception results and sets alert protocols, triggering audible or visual warnings via the prompting device or transmitting alert information to the instrument cluster linkage system.

batchPhoto2.title: Meets ISA and DDAW/ADDW regulatory requirements
DDAW features 9 fatigue levels with >95% accuracy,surpassing the 40% regulatory requirement
Meets the requirements of R155 and R156 regulations
Meets the requirements of R10, R118, ROHS and REACH regulations • AEC-Q100 qualified
ADDW meets all distraction point detection requirements specified by regulations, with a 100% pass rate in certification testing
ISA holds component STU certificate, exempting 400km European road testing
ISA combines AI vision with map data for dual-validation, achieving 98.5% alert accuracy (exceeding regulatory requirements)

content.title: DC Max
content.single3: DC Max: A Dashcam Designed for Trucking Industry | Streamax
content.single8: Modular AI DashCam Add-On — Full AI video without replacing hardware.
content.note1: Modular AI DashCam Add-On — Full AI video without replacing hardware.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax DC Max, a dashcam designed for Trucking industry. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: DC Max is a modular dual-lens AI dashcam add-on designed to work exclusively with the GT1 Pro. Together, they form a Modular Smart Combo, enabling AI video telematics without replacing existing hardware. Its 4MP ultra-wide black-light road camera captures clearer footage at night, while the 4MP cabin camera delivers a wide HD in-vehicle view. When paired with GT1 Pro and additional cameras, the system supports up to 6-channel recording and AI features such as ADAS, DMS, and BSD, helping drivers reduce potential hazards. This modular design gives fleets the flexibility to scale from basic telematics to full AI video protection at any time.

batchPhoto2.title: Works exclusively with GT1 Pro, expanding it to support up to 6-channel recording
4MP ultra-wide road camera with black-light night vision, paired with a 4MP HD cabin camera
AES256 encryption + TLS1.3 secure data transmission
On-board eMMC storage (up to 256GB) + MicroSD expansion (up to 1TB)
Magnetic privacy shutter for the in-cabin camera protects driver privacy when parked
GT1 Pro MicroSD storage supports sub-stream backups when paired with DC Max

content.content1: GT1 Pro is a cellular FMS gateway designed for vehicle tracking, remote diagnostics, and fleet-wide operational visibility. It connects to the Driver App and fleet platform to provide live GPS, alerts, and maintenance data. When paired with DC Max or additional cameras, GT1 Pro upgrades into a full AI video telematics system, supporting up to 6-channel recording. Its strong expansion capability makes it suitable for a wide range of trucking scenarios and peripheral sensors such as fuel, door, temperature/humidity, and RFID.

content.title: A16MAX（IBCU）
content.single3: A16MAX (IBCU): An MDVR Designed for Public Transit | Streamax
content.single8: One For All - Delivers intelligent and integrated control to enhance vehicle safety, optimize operations, and enable next-generation smart mobility.
content.note1: One For All - Delivers intelligent and integrated control to enhance vehicle safety, optimize operations, and enable next-generation smart mobility.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax A16MAX-IBCU, an MDVR designed for public transit. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: IBCU Intelligent Bus Central Processing Unit integrates cutting-edge technologies such as high-performance SoC, 5G communication, AI recognition, and high-precision positioning. It combines four core applications—driving safety, public security, passenger services, and operational management—into one centralized system. A single unit supports ADAS, DMS, 360° surround view monitoring, HD video surveillance, intelligent passenger flow analysis, and dynamic information display, serving as the intelligent hub for the entire bus.

batchPhoto2.title: Dual OS support: Linux and Android
6 Tops AI Build In power
24 Channels for Video
Support Up to 7 screen

content.title: PVR (Palm Vein Recognition)
content.single3: PVR: Palm Vein Recognition for School Bus Safety | Streamax
content.single8: Cardless and contactless passenger attendance for day-to-day operation.
content.note1: Cardless and contactless passenger attendance for day-to-day operation.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax PVR (Palm Vein Recognition), an accessory designed for school bus. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: This module utilizes AI to recognize biometric features of the human palm. It is capable of reading palm in any direction with an ultra-low response and matching time. Further, only real palm will be recognized.

batchPhoto2.title: Wide operating temperature range
Real-time ultra-fast recognition time
Compact size for on-board application
360-degree all-round recognition

content.title: Z5
content.single3: Z5: An Intelligent Hub Designed for Asset Security | Streamax
content.single8: Intelligent Cargo Guardian: Real-time loading visibility with full cargo protection.
content.note1: Intelligent Cargo Guardian: Real-time loading visibility with full cargo protection.
content.note3: Discover the Streamax Z5, a camera designed for asset security. View its key features, specifications and compatible fleet safety applications.
content.content1: Z5 is an all-in-one AI-powered device built for smarter, safer, and more efficient cargo management. With a high-speed processor, advanced system architecture, and 4K dual-channel video recording, it delivers clear, reliable insights from every journey. Equipped with GPS, 4G, Bluetooth, and AI visual recognition, Z5 enables real-time cargo tracking, intelligent load analysis, and instant alerts for full operational visibility. Its adaptive power management and rugged minimalist design ensure long-lasting performance, making it the ultimate companion for demanding logistics environments.

batchPhoto2.title: Dual-channel AI monitoring with 4K black-light interior and 1080p exterior video for full cargo visibility — even in deep or low-light cargo spaces
AI-powered cargo management analyzes load utilization, tracks cargo conditions, and improves operational efficiency
Seamless connectivity via GPS, 4G, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth for real-time tracking, alerts, and sensor integration
Sustainable power design supports solar charging and smart power-saving modes for long-term reliability
Cloud-based control and insights enable remote monitoring, data visualization, and performance reporting
